Name: GRAB_PARAM
Description: Defines grab, throw, and attachment behavior between attacker and target characters, including IK attachment points, positional alignment, cast detection, and camera settings.

Fields.Name: Attacker Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used as the attachment or alignment point for the grabbing character.

Fields.Name: Attacker Rotation Type
Fields.Description: Controls rotational alignment behavior for the grabbing character.

Fields.Name: Attacker Right Hand IK Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used for right hand inverse kinematics during the grab animation.

Fields.Name: Attacker Left Hand IK Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used for left hand inverse kinematics during the grab animation.

Fields.Name: Attacker Right Leg IK Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used for right leg inverse kinematics during the grab animation.

Fields.Name: Attacker Left Leg IK Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used for left leg inverse kinematics during the grab animation.

Fields.Name: Defender Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used as the attachment or alignment point for the grabbed target.

Fields.Name: Defender Rotation Type
Fields.Description: Controls rotational alignment behavior for the grabbed target.

Fields.Name: Defender Right Hand IK Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used for right hand inverse kinematics on the grabbed target.

Fields.Name: Defender Left Hand IK Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used for left hand inverse kinematics on the grabbed target.

Fields.Name: Defender Right Leg IK Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used for right leg inverse kinematics on the grabbed target.

Fields.Name: Defender Left Leg IK Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used for left leg inverse kinematics on the grabbed target.

Fields.Name: Grab Position Attachment Type
Fields.Description: Determines how the grabbed target snaps to the grab position.

Fields.Name: Grab Attachment Follow Setting
Fields.Description: Controls whether the grabbed target continuously follows the grab attachment point.

Fields.Name: Grab Direction Attachment Type
Fields.Description: Determines how facing direction is aligned during the grab.

Fields.Name: Grab Direction Reversal Enabled
Fields.Description: Enables reversing the facing direction during grab alignment.

Fields.Name: Grab Position Offset: X
Fields.Description: Horizontal X-axis offset applied to the grab attachment position.

Fields.Name: Grab Position Offset: Z
Fields.Description: Forward/backward Z-axis offset applied to the grab attachment position.

Fields.Name: Grab Break HP Threshold
Fields.Description: HP threshold at which the grab can be interrupted or broken.

Fields.Name: Grab Camera ID
Fields.Description: Camera configuration used during the grab animation or cinematic.

Fields.Name: Grab Cast Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the collision or detection cast type used to validate grab targets.

Fields.Name: Cast Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of the detection cast used for grab targeting.

Fields.Name: Cast Height
Fields.Description: Height of the detection cast used for grab targeting.

Fields.Name: Cast Length
Fields.Description: Forward length of the detection cast used for grab targeting.

Fields.Name: Cast Offset: X
Fields.Description: Horizontal X-axis offset applied to the detection cast position.

Fields.Name: Cast Offset: Y
Fields.Description: Vertical Y-axis offset applied to the detection cast position.

Fields.Name: Cast Offset: Z
Fields.Description: Forward/backward Z-axis offset applied to the detection cast position.

Fields.Name: Allowed Horizontal Grab Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum horizontal angle allowed for a valid grab target.

Fields.Name: Allowed Upward Grab Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum upward angle allowed for a valid grab target.

Fields.Name: Allowed Downward Grab Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum downward angle allowed for a valid grab target.

Fields.Name: Maximum Grab Angle Difference
Fields.Description: Maximum allowed facing angle difference between attacker and target for a successful grab.
